subject: Young woman in green crop top, yellow scarf, denim shorts, and fishnet arm coverings, grinning confidently
description: A young woman stands in a relaxed, self-assured pose with a wide grin. She wears a green crop top, a yellow scarf around her neck, denim shorts, brown boots, and fishnet coverings on her arms and legs. A large semi-transparent echo or ghost of the same figure looms behind her, slightly larger. The anime linework is clean and energetic. The background is a soft pale green wash. The figure's posture and grin convey irreverence and confidence. No weapons are visible in her hands; she is posed casually, hands at sides.
foreground: Grinning young woman in casual combat attire, relaxed stance
background: Pale green wash with a large semi-transparent echo figure
